apihelp-query+growthtasks-summary: Hel talooyin hawlo ah oo ku habboon dadka cusub
apihelp-query+growthtasks-extended-descr: Waxay soo jeedisaa maqaalal leh dhibaatooyin yar-yar oo weli taagan, kuwaas oo ku habboon in si fudud ay wax uga qabtaan tifaftirayaasha cusub.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-param-tasktype: Noocyada hawlaha si loo xaddido natiijooyinka. Haddii la dhaafo, dhammaan talooyinka waa la soo bandhigayaa.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-param-topics: Mawduucyada maqaalka ee la doorbidayo marka la soo jeedinayo hawlaha.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee talooyinka hawlaha ee la soo celinayo.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-param-excludep: Aqoonsiyada bogagga ee laga reebayo su'aasha.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-param-debug: Ku dar xogta cillad bixinta wax-soo saarka.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-example-1: Hel soo-jeedimaha hawlaha nooca tafatirka qoraalka ee isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+growthtasks-example-2: Hel soo-jeedimaha hawlaha ee isticmaalaha hadda, oo ay la socoto xog fidsan oo ku saabsan boggaga.
apihelp-query+growthnextsuggestedtasktyp: Hel nooca hawsha ee loo soo jeedinayo isticmaalaha inuu xiga isku dayo.
Nooca hawsha uu isticmaalahu hadda ku gajaysan yahay.
apihelp-growthexperiments-structured-tas:
Xadhig JSON ah oo ka kooban shay wata furayaashan:
* <var>acceptedTargets</var>: (waa ikhtiyaari) Unug ka kooban ciwaannada boggaga, kuwaas oo isku-xidhkooda la soo jeediyey uu isticmaalahu aqbalay.
* <var>rejectedTargets</var>: (waa ikhtiyaari) Unug ka kooban ciwaannada boggaga, kuwaas oo isku-xidhkooda la soo jeediyey uu isticmaalahu diiday.
* <var>skippedTargets</var>: (waa ikhtiyaari) Unug ka kooban ciwaannada boggaga, kuwaas oo isku-xidhkooda la soo jeediyey uu isticmaalahu ka booday (isaga tegay).

Xadhig JSON ah oo ka kooban shay wata furayaashan:
* <var>accepted</var>: Boole tilmaamaya in isticmaalahu aqbalay sawirka la soo jeediyey iyo in kale.
* <var>reasons</var>: Unug xadhko ah oo tilmaamaya sababta uu isticmaalahu u diiday sawirka la soo jeediyey. Qiimayaasha ansaxda ah: $1
* <var>caption</var>: Qoraalka sawirka la socda ee uu isticmaalahu bixiyey. (Waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|xaraf|xarafo}}.)

Xadhig JSON ah oo ka kooban shay wata furayaashan:
* <var>accepted</var>: Boole tilmaamaya in isticmaalahu aqbalay sawirka la soo jeediyey iyo in kale.
* <var>reasons</var>: Unug xadhko ah oo tilmaamaya sababta uu isticmaalahu u diiday sawirka la soo jeediyey. Qiimayaasha ansaxda ah: $1
* <var>caption</var>: Qoraalka sawirka la socda ee uu isticmaalahu bixiyey. (Waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan $2 {{PLURAL:$2|xaraf|xarafo}}.)
* <var>sectionTitle</var>: Ciwaanka qaybta loo sameeyey soo-jeedinta.
* <var>sectionNumber</var>: Lambarka tirsiga ee qaybta maqaalka ee loo sameeyey soo-jeedinta.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-paramvalue-plug: Isticmaal marka la kaydinayo wax ka beddelka habaysan ee GrowthExperiments ee ah "[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/Personalized_first_day/Structured_tasks/Add_a_link Ku dar isku-xidh]".
Isticmaal marka la kaydinayo wax ka beddelka habaysan ee GrowthExperiments ee ah "[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/Personalized_first_day/Structured_tasks/Add_an_image Ku dar sawir]".

Isticmaal marka la kaydinayo wax-ka-beddelka habaysan ee GrowthExperiments ee ah "[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Growth/Personalized_first_day/Structured_tasks/Add_an_image#"Add_an_image"_to_a_Section Ku dar sawir qayb ka mid ah]".
apierror-growthexperiments-addimage-hand: Halbeegga 'accepted' ayaa ka maqan xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka
Halbeegga 'accepted' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka waa inuu ahaadaa boole, laakiin waa $1
Halbeegga 'reasons' ayaa ka maqan xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka
Halbeegga 'reasons' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka waa inuu ahaadaa unug, laakiin waa $1
Shayga '$1' ee halbeegga 'reasons' ma ansaxa, waa inuu ahaadaa mid ka mid ah: $2
Halbeegga 'sectionTitle' ayaa ka maqan xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka
Halbeegga 'sectionTitle' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka waa inuu ahaadaa eber, laakiin waa $1
Halbeegga 'sectionNumber' ayaa ka maqan xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka
Halbeegga 'sectionNumber' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka waa inuu ahaadaa eber, laakiin waa $1
apierror-growthexperiments-addsectionima: Halbeegga 'sectionTitle' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka Qaybta waa inuu ahaadaa qoraal, laakiin waa $1
Halbeegga 'sectionNumber' ee ku jira xogta plugin-ka Ku dar Sawirka Qaybta waa inuu ahaadaa tirada idil, laakiin waa $1
apierror-growthexperiments-addlink-handl: Lama helin diiwaanka soo jeedinta xiriiriyaha
Bartilmaameedyada soo jeedinta xiriiriyaha ee aan la filayn: $1
growthexperiments-addimage-feedback-acce: Halbeegga <var>editRevId</var> waa khasab marka halbeegga <var>accepted</var> loo dejiyo <kbd>true</kbd>.
growthexperiments-addimage-feedback-reje: Halbeegga <var>editRevId</var> lama isticmaali karo marka halbeegga <var>accepted</var> loo dejiyo <kbd>false</kbd>.
growthexperiments-addimage-feedback-acce: Halbeegga <var>caption</var> waa khasab marka halbeegga <var>accepted</var> loo dejiyo <kbd>true</kbd>.
growthexperiments-addimage-feedback-revi: Dib u eegista lagu qeexay <var>editRevId</var> lama helin.
growthexperiments-addimage-feedback-inva: Dib u eegista lagu qeexay <var>editRevId</var> waxay ka tirsan tahay bog kale.
